subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye ever abide, and continue to abide, beneath the sheltering shade of the All-Possessing, the Most Exalted. He remembereth you even as He hath remembered you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم تزل و لاتزال در ظل عنایت غنی متعال باشید انه یذکرکم کما ذکرکم
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
